name: Pumpkin Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil equal parts of peeled pumpkin and potatoes until cooked.
2. Drain the vegetables, add the finely chopped onion, and a piece of butter.
3. Mash everything together until creamy.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Serve with golden slices of fried bacon or pancetta.
